description: Execute raw SQL queries against SQL Server, SQLite, PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MariaDB, then return the results.
name: io.github.KifoPL/RawSqlMcp
title: Raw SQL MCP

environmentVariables.name: RawSqlMcp__Databases__Default__Provider
environmentVariables.description: Database provider for the named database. Supported values: sqlserver, sqlite, postgres, postgresql, mysql, mariadb.

environmentVariables.name: RawSqlMcp__Databases__Default__ConnectionString
environmentVariables.description: Connection string for the named database.

environmentVariables.name: RawSqlMcp__ConnectionStrings__Default
environmentVariables.description: Obsolete. Use RawSqlMcp__Databases__Default__Provider and RawSqlMcp__Databases__Default__ConnectionString instead. Legacy connection strings are interpreted as SQL Server.
